name: cozy
description: Cozy indie cafe vibes with a vintage tee, a good book, and a warm reading nook. This mood positions GAIA Print merch as the perfect companion for your chill day — sustainable fashion that feels like home.

style.lighting: warm cafe window light | soft ambient indoor glow | golden reading lamp
style.color_grade: warm muted earth tones | olive and gold warmth | soft vintage feel
style.camera: medium lifestyle portrait | close-up fabric texture | cozy corner establishing shot
style.composition: person in cozy setting | tee and book pairing | layered textures and comfort items
style.props: vintage tee, indie cafe table, book, warm drink, tote bag on chair, plant corner

copy_tone: Relaxed and authentic, like a caption on a lazy Sunday photo. Understated cool. Uses words like 'vibe,' 'chill,' 'favorite tee.' Anti-hustle energy.

music.mood: indie acoustic, lo-fi cafe beats, soft jazz

example_prompt_fragment: A person wearing an olive green GAIA Print tee sitting in a cozy indie cafe corner, warm window light, book open on a wooden table beside a latte, tote bag hanging on the chair, potted plant in background, warm muted earth tones with gold accents, lifestyle fashion photography with authentic indie cafe vibes
